items.html: Afterwards, Aba and Ima raise them to the Chuppah [wedding canopy], in their upper palace, after the Nesirah [sawing apart] — while there are still in them only the Lights of Achor be Achor [back to back] — and they couple there Panim be Panim [face to face], and he places in her the Hasadim of Ima, which are also nothing but five Gevurot of MA of BON from his own discernment, except that relative to her Gevurot they are called Hasadim. And then these Hasadim are called Rucha de Shadi be Gavah [the spirit that he casts into her], for then it is in the secret of an actual Zivug [coupling].
